---
title: "Mission 2 — Analyse de la capacité explicative des pressions EXIOBASE vis-à-vis des écarts aux standards ESGAP"
author: "Abdoulaye Diakité — AFD ISR ECO, Équipe Biodiversité"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: show
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo       = TRUE,
  message    = FALSE,
  warning    = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  fig.align  = "center"
)
```

```{r ind03-extraction-stressors}
# Objectif : extraire les pressions nappes phréatiques Ind. 03 depuis intermediate
# en filtrant sur les stressors de mapping_ind03

stressors_ind03 <- mapping_ind03$stressor

pressions_ind03 <- intermediate %>%
  filter(stressor %in% stressors_ind03) %>%
  group_by(pays, stressor, annee) %>%
  summarise(valeur = sum(valeur, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cat("Lignes dans pressions_ind03 :", nrow(pressions_ind03), "\n")
cat("Pays couverts               :", n_distinct(pressions_ind03$pays), "\n")
cat("Années disponibles          :", paste(range(pressions_ind03$annee), collapse = " - "), "\n")
cat("Stressors disponibles       :", n_distinct(pressions_ind03$stressor), "\n")
cat("\nListe des stressors :\n")
print(unique(pressions_ind03$stressor))
```

```{r ind03-definition-groupes}
# Objectif : définir les 3 groupes sectoriels pour les tests
# Groupe 1 : eau bleue Agriculture | Groupe 2 : eau bleue Électricité
# Groupe 3 : dépôts atmosphériques (N, P, métaux lourds, CO2)

stressors_agri_ind03 <- c(
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - wheat",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - other cereals",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - vegetables",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - fruits",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - other crops",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - fodder crops"
)

stressors_elec_ind03 <- c(
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - tower - Electricity by coal",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - tower - Electricity by nuclear",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - once-through - Electricity by coal",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - once-through - Electricity by nuclear"
)

stressors_pollution_ind03 <- c(
  "N - agriculture - water",
  "P - agriculture - water",
  "As - combustion - air",
  "Cd - combustion - air",
  "Hg - combustion - air",
  "Pb - combustion - air",
  "Ni - combustion - air",
  "Cr - combustion - air",
  "Benzo(a)pyrene - combustion - air",
  "PCBs - combustion - air",
  "CO2 - combustion - air"
)

pressions_ind03 <- pressions_ind03 %>%
  mutate(
    groupe = case_when(
      stressor %in% stressors_agri_ind03      ~ "Eau_Agriculture",
      stressor %in% stressors_elec_ind03      ~ "Eau_Electricite",
      stressor %in% stressors_pollution_ind03 ~ "Pollution_Depots",
      TRUE ~ "Autre"
    )
  )

cat("=== Répartition stressors par groupe ===\n")
print(pressions_ind03 %>% distinct(stressor, groupe) %>% arrange(groupe))
```

```{r ind03-definition-groupes-corrige}
# Objectif : redéfinir les groupes avec unités cohérentes
# Groupe A : eau totale (Mm³) — Agriculture + Électricité, avec sous-totaux
# Groupe B : dépôts combustion (kg) — métaux lourds + CO2
# Groupe C : N et P agriculture (kg) — eutrophisation

stressors_eau_agri <- c(
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - wheat",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - other cereals",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - vegetables",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - fruits",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - other crops",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Agriculture - fodder crops"
)

stressors_eau_elec <- c(
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - tower - Electricity by coal",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - tower - Electricity by nuclear",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - once-through - Electricity by coal",
  "Water Consumption Blue - Electricity - once-through - Electricity by nuclear"
)

stressors_depots_combustion <- c(
  "As - combustion - air",
  "Cd - combustion - air",
  "Hg - combustion - air",
  "Pb - combustion - air",
  "Ni - combustion - air",
  "Cr - combustion - air",
  "Benzo(a)pyrene - combustion - air",
  "PCBs - combustion - air",
  "CO2 - combustion - air"
)

stressors_np_agri <- c(
  "N - agriculture - water",
  "P - agriculture - water"
)

pressions_ind03 <- pressions_ind03 %>%
  mutate(
    groupe = case_when(
      stressor %in% stressors_eau_agri          ~ "Eau_Agriculture",
      stressor %in% stressors_eau_elec          ~ "Eau_Electricite",
      stressor %in% stressors_depots_combustion ~ "Depots_Combustion",
      stressor %in% stressors_np_agri           ~ "NP_Agriculture",
      TRUE ~ "Autre"
    ),
    unite = case_when(
      groupe %in% c("Eau_Agriculture", "Eau_Electricite") ~ "Mm3",
      groupe %in% c("Depots_Combustion", "NP_Agriculture") ~ "kg",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

cat("=== Répartition stressors par groupe ===\n")
print(pressions_ind03 %>% distinct(stressor, groupe, unite) %>% arrange(groupe))
```

```{r ind03-pression-eau-totale}
# Objectif : pression eau totale (Mm³) = Agriculture + Électricité
# avec sous-totaux sectoriels pour voir la part de chacun

pression_eau_ind03 <- pressions_ind03 %>%
  filter(groupe %in% c("Eau_Agriculture", "Eau_Electricite")) %>%
  group_by(pays, annee, groupe) %>%
  summarise(valeur = sum(valeur, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = groupe, values_from = valeur, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    eau_totale_mm3   = Eau_Agriculture + Eau_Electricite,
    part_agri_pct    = round(Eau_Agriculture / eau_totale_mm3 * 100, 1),
    part_elec_pct    = round(Eau_Electricite / eau_totale_mm3 * 100, 1)
  )

cat("=== Pression eau totale par pays × année (Mm³) ===\n")
print(pression_eau_ind03, n = 20)
```

```{r ind03-pression-depots-combustion}
# Objectif : pression dépôts combustion (kg) — métaux lourds + CO2

pression_depots_ind03 <- pressions_ind03 %>%
  filter(groupe == "Depots_Combustion") %>%
  group_by(pays, annee) %>%
  summarise(depots_kg = sum(valeur, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cat("=== Pression dépôts combustion par pays × année (kg) ===\n")
print(pression_depots_ind03, n = 20)
```

```{r ind03-pression-np-agriculture}
# Objectif : pression N et P agriculture (kg) 

pression_np_ind03 <- pressions_ind03 %>%
  filter(groupe == "NP_Agriculture") %>%
  group_by(pays, annee) %>%
  summarise(np_kg = sum(valeur, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cat("=== Pression N+P agriculture par pays × année (kg) ===\n")
print(pression_np_ind03, n = 20)
```
```{r ind03-stats-eau}
# Objectif : stats descriptives eau totale + sous-groupes par pays sur 1995-2022

stats_eau_ind03 <- pression_eau_ind03 %>%
  group_by(pays) %>%
  summarise(
    moy_total     = round(mean(eau_totale_mm3,    na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    moy_agri      = round(mean(Eau_Agriculture,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    moy_elec      = round(mean(Eau_Electricite,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    part_agri_moy = round(mean(part_agri_pct,     na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    part_elec_moy = round(mean(part_elec_pct,     na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(moy_total))

cat("=== Stats eau totale par pays (Mm³) — 1995-2022 ===\n")
print(stats_eau_ind03, n = Inf)
```

```{r ind03-stats-depots}
# Objectif : stats descriptives dépôts combustion par pays sur 1995-2022

stats_depots_ind03 <- pression_depots_ind03 %>%
  group_by(pays) %>%
  summarise(
    moy     = round(mean(depots_kg,  na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    min     = round(min(depots_kg,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    max     = round(max(depots_kg,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    var_abs = round(max(depots_kg,   na.rm = TRUE) - min(depots_kg, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    var_pct = round((max(depots_kg,  na.rm = TRUE) - min(depots_kg, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                      min(depots_kg, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(moy))

cat("=== Stats dépôts combustion par pays (kg) — 1995-2022 ===\n")
print(stats_depots_ind03, n = Inf)
```

```{r ind03-stats-np}
# Objectif : stats descriptives N+P agriculture par pays sur 1995-2022

stats_np_ind03 <- pression_np_ind03 %>%
  group_by(pays) %>%
  summarise(
    moy     = round(mean(np_kg,  na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    min     = round(min(np_kg,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    max     = round(max(np_kg,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    var_abs = round(max(np_kg,   na.rm = TRUE) - min(np_kg, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    var_pct = round((max(np_kg,  na.rm = TRUE) - min(np_kg, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                      min(np_kg, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(moy))

cat("=== Stats N+P agriculture par pays (kg) — 1995-2022 ===\n")
print(stats_np_ind03, n = Inf)

```
```{r ind03-timeseries-eau}
# Objectif : time series eau totale (Mm³) par pays, 27 pays
# même style que Ind. 01 et Ind. 04

p_ts_eau_ind03 <- ggplot(
    pression_eau_ind03,
    aes(x = annee, y = eau_totale_mm3)
  ) +
  geom_line(colour = "#D73027", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ pays, ncol = 4, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1995, 2005, 2015, 2022)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Ind. 03 — Évolution de la pression eau totale par pays (1995–2022)",
    subtitle = "Agriculture + Électricité agrégées | Source : EXIOBASE v3.10.2",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Eau totale (Mm³)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, colour = "black"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

ggsave("Ind03_timeseries_eau_totale_27pays.png",
       plot = p_ts_eau_ind03, width = 16, height = 20, dpi = 300)
p_ts_eau_ind03
```

```{r ind03-timeseries-depots}
# Objectif : time series dépôts combustion (kg) par pays

p_ts_depots_ind03 <- ggplot(
    pression_depots_ind03,
    aes(x = annee, y = depots_kg)
  ) +
  geom_line(colour = "#4575B4", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ pays, ncol = 4, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1995, 2005, 2015, 2022)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Ind. 03 — Évolution des dépôts combustion par pays (1995–2022)",
    subtitle = "Métaux lourds + Benzo(a)pyrene + PCBs + CO2 | Source : EXIOBASE v3.10.2",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Dépôts combustion (kg)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, colour = "black"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

ggsave("Ind03_timeseries_depots_27pays.png",
       plot = p_ts_depots_ind03, width = 16, height = 20, dpi = 300)
p_ts_depots_ind03
```

```{r ind03-timeseries-np}
# Objectif : time series N+P agriculture (kg) par pays

p_ts_np_ind03 <- ggplot(
    pression_np_ind03,
    aes(x = annee, y = np_kg)
  ) +
  geom_line(colour = "#1A9850", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ pays, ncol = 4, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1995, 2005, 2015, 2022)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Ind. 03 — Évolution de la pression N+P agriculture par pays (1995–2022)",
    subtitle = "Azote + Phosphore | Source : EXIOBASE v3.10.2",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "N+P agriculture (kg)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, colour = "black"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

ggsave("Ind03_timeseries_NP_agriculture_27pays.png",
       plot = p_ts_np_ind03, width = 16, height = 20, dpi = 300)
p_ts_np_ind03
```

```{r ind03-taux-variation-eau}
# Objectif : taux de variation eau totale, fenêtre SESPI to.03 (2009→2015)

variation_eau_ind03 <- pression_eau_ind03 %>%
  filter(annee %in% c(2009, 2015)) %>%
  select(pays, annee, eau_totale_mm3) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = annee, values_from = eau_totale_mm3,
              names_prefix = "eau_") %>%
  filter(!is.na(eau_2009) & !is.na(eau_2015)) %>%
  mutate(
    variation_abs = round(eau_2015 - eau_2009, 2),
    variation_pct = round((eau_2015 - eau_2009) / eau_2009 * 100, 1),
    direction     = case_when(
      variation_pct >  5  ~ "Hausse",
      variation_pct < -5  ~ "Baisse",
      TRUE                ~ "Stable"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(variation_pct)

cat("=== Taux de variation eau totale 2009 → 2015 ===\n")
print(variation_eau_ind03, n = 27)
```

```{r ind03-taux-variation-depots}
# Objectif : taux de variation dépôts combustion, fenêtre 2009→2015

variation_depots_ind03 <- pression_depots_ind03 %>%
  filter(annee %in% c(2009, 2015)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = annee, values_from = depots_kg,
              names_prefix = "depots_") %>%
  filter(!is.na(depots_2009) & !is.na(depots_2015)) %>%
  mutate(
    variation_abs = round(depots_2015 - depots_2009, 2),
    variation_pct = round((depots_2015 - depots_2009) / depots_2009 * 100, 1),
    direction     = case_when(
      variation_pct >  5  ~ "Hausse",
      variation_pct < -5  ~ "Baisse",
      TRUE                ~ "Stable"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(variation_pct)

cat("=== Taux de variation dépôts combustion 2009 → 2015 ===\n")
print(variation_depots_ind03, n = 28)
```

```{r ind03-taux-variation-np}
# Objectif : taux de variation N+P agriculture, fenêtre 2009→2015

variation_np_ind03 <- pression_np_ind03 %>%
  filter(annee %in% c(2009, 2015)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = annee, values_from = np_kg,
              names_prefix = "np_") %>%
  filter(!is.na(np_2009) & !is.na(np_2015)) %>%
  mutate(
    variation_abs = round(np_2015 - np_2009, 2),
    variation_pct = round((np_2015 - np_2009) / np_2009 * 100, 1),
    direction     = case_when(
      variation_pct >  5  ~ "Hausse",
      variation_pct < -5  ~ "Baisse",
      TRUE                ~ "Stable"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(variation_pct)

cat("=== Taux de variation N+P agriculture 2009 → 2015 ===\n")
print(variation_np_ind03, n = 28)
```
